current_public_release.name: Webhookery v0.2.0-pilot
current_public_release.status: pilot prerelease for controlled self-hosted evaluation

next_pilot_package.status: collect sanitized evaluator feedback and accepted-risk closure evidence before the next tag

notes: GitHub Releases remains the external source of truth for published tags and assets.
Current release evidence uses local/fake provider and receiver acceptance gates plus DB-backed release workflow checks unless separate live-provider proof records say otherwise.

Release evidence is not exactly-once delivery proof, provider-side event completeness proof, compliance certification, legal evidentiary certification, external timestamping, or live-provider acceptance.
Branch protection and external review gaps are accepted only for the v0.2.0-pilot prerelease and block broader production-readiness language.
